title: Add dashboard layout framework
body: Create the base layout for the dashboard, including header, sidebar, and main content area. Ensure responsive design and clean structure.

title: Add system overview card
body: Create a top-level system overview card showing current power, daily energy, system status, and last update timestamp.

title: Add panel grid view
body: Implement a grid-based visualization of all solar panels using the row/column naming scheme. Include per-panel status and power output.

title: Add daily production chart
body: Add a chart showing today's production curve using aggregated data. Include tooltips and hover interactions.

title: Add historical energy charts
body: Implement charts for daily, weekly, and monthly energy summaries. Use cached/aggregated data for fast loading.

title: Add system status indicators
body: Display collector status, backup status, disk usage, and time sync health using color-coded indicators.

title: Add settings menu
body: Create a settings menu with navigation to configuration editor, theme options, and system info.

title: Add dark mode toggle
body: Implement a dark/light mode toggle with persistent user preference storage.

title: Add mobile-responsive layout
body: Ensure the dashboard works cleanly on mobile devices with collapsible menus and adaptive charts.

title: Add error and offline states
body: Design UI states for when the backend is unreachable, collector is offline, or data is missing.

title: Create systemd service for collector
body: Create a systemd service unit to run the collector automatically on boot. Ensure restart policies and logging are configured.

title: Create systemd service for backend API
body: Add a systemd service to run the FastAPI backend on boot with automatic restarts and proper logging.

title: Add systemd timer for nightly backups
body: Create a systemd timer and service pair to run nightly database backups. Ensure logs are captured and failures are reported.

title: Add systemd watchdog for collector
body: Enable systemd watchdog functionality to detect collector hangs or freezes. Configure heartbeat interval and restart behavior.

title: Add systemd watchdog for backend
body: Enable watchdog monitoring for the FastAPI backend to detect hangs and automatically restart the service.

title: Add journald log rotation rules
body: Configure journald to rotate logs for collector, backend, and backup services to prevent disk overuse.

title: Add systemctl status endpoint integration
body: Expose systemd service health (active, failed, restarting) through a backend API endpoint for dashboard display.

title: Add systemd environment file support
body: Create environment files for collector and backend services to allow configuration overrides without editing unit files.

title: Add systemd reload support for config changes
body: Enable `systemctl reload` behavior for services that support hot‑reload, ensuring config updates apply without restart.

title: Add systemd service dependency graph
body: Define proper `After=`, `Requires=`, and `Wants=` relationships so services start in the correct order and recover gracefully.

title: Add GitHub Actions workflow for backend tests
body: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to run backend unit tests on every push and pull request. Include Python version matrix and caching.

title: Add GitHub Actions workflow for dashboard build
body: Set up a workflow to build the dashboard UI on every push. Ensure Node dependencies are cached and build artifacts are validated.

title: Add linting workflow for Python and JavaScript
body: Add a CI workflow that runs flake8/black for Python and ESLint/prettier for JavaScript. Fail builds on lint errors.

title: Add automated Docker image build
body: Create a workflow to build Docker images for backend and collector on tagged releases. Push images to GitHub Container Registry.

title: Add automated deployment workflow
body: Set up a workflow that deploys the backend to the Raspberry Pi or remote server using SSH or rsync on release tags.

title: Add database migration check
body: Add a CI step that verifies database schema migrations apply cleanly and do not break existing data.

title: Add test coverage reporting
body: Integrate coverage.py and frontend coverage tools. Upload coverage reports to GitHub Actions summary.

title: Add dependency vulnerability scanning
body: Enable Dependabot or GitHub Advanced Security to scan Python and Node dependencies for vulnerabilities.

title: Add workflow to validate systemd unit files
body: Create a CI job that validates systemd unit files for syntax correctness and required fields.

title: Add release notes automation
body: Automatically generate release notes from merged PRs using GitHub’s release automation tools.

title: Add centralized configuration file
body: Create a single configuration file (YAML or TOML) that defines all tunable system parameters including collector settings, backup paths, thresholds, and dashboard options.

title: Add configuration loader module
body: Implement a Python module to load, validate, and expose configuration values to the collector and backend. Include schema validation.

title: Add hot‑reload support for configuration
body: Enable the backend to reload configuration without restarting the service. Provide an endpoint or signal‑based trigger.

title: Add configuration editor UI
body: Add a dashboard page that allows editing configuration values with validation and save/apply controls.

title: Add configuration versioning and rollback
body: Store configuration history and allow rollback to previous versions. Include timestamps and change summaries.

title: Add per‑panel performance analytics
body: Implement analytics to compare each panel’s performance over time. Identify underperforming panels and calculate deviation from expected output.

title: Add daily energy summary computation
body: Create a backend job to compute daily energy totals and store them in an aggregated table for fast dashboard loading.

title: Add system efficiency metrics
body: Calculate system‑level efficiency metrics such as performance ratio, inverter efficiency, and expected vs. actual generation.

title: Add anomaly detection for panel output
body: Implement anomaly detection to flag panels with sudden drops, flatlines, or unusual patterns. Expose results via API.

title: Add long‑term trends and insights
body: Generate weekly, monthly, and seasonal insights. Include trends, averages, and year‑over‑year comparisons.

title: Add low‑output alerting
body: Trigger alerts when a panel or the entire system produces significantly less power than expected. Include thresholds and hysteresis.

title: Add offline panel detection
body: Detect when a panel stops reporting data and generate an alert with timestamp and panel identifier.

title: Add collector failure alerts
body: Generate alerts when the collector service crashes, hangs, or stops sending data. Integrate with systemd watchdog.

title: Add backup failure alerts
body: Trigger alerts when nightly backups fail, run late, or produce corrupted output. Include log excerpts.

title: Add alert history and acknowledgment
body: Store alert history and allow users to acknowledge, silence, or clear alerts through the dashboard.

title: Add system architecture documentation
body: Create a high‑level architecture document describing data flow, collector behavior, backend API structure, and dashboard components.

title: Add installation and setup guide
body: Write a step‑by‑step guide for installing the system on a Raspberry Pi or server, including dependencies, environment setup, and service installation.

title: Add API reference documentation
body: Document all backend API endpoints, including request/response formats, authentication (if any), and example payloads.

title: Add troubleshooting guide
body: Create a troubleshooting guide covering common issues such as collector failures, systemd errors, missing data, and dashboard loading problems.

title: Add contributor guide
body: Write a contributor guide including coding standards, branching strategy, testing requirements, and how to run the system locally.

title: Add nightly backup job
body: Create a nightly backup job that exports the SQLite database and raw data files. Ensure backups run reliably and produce timestamped files.

title: Add backup compression
body: Compress backup files using gzip or zstd to reduce storage usage. Validate integrity after compression.

title: Add backup retention policy
body: Implement a retention policy that automatically deletes backups older than a configurable number of days.

title: Add backup integrity checker
body: Create a script that verifies backup file integrity and logs any corruption or incomplete files.

title: Add backup restore script
body: Implement a restore script that can rebuild the database from a backup file. Include safety checks and confirmation prompts.

title: Add backup location configuration
body: Allow backup destination paths to be configured via the central configuration file. Support local and external storage.

title: Add backup status API endpoint
body: Expose backup status, last run time, and last success/failure via a backend API endpoint.

title: Add dashboard backup status card
body: Create a dashboard card showing last backup time, success/failure state, and next scheduled run.

title: Add backup failure alerting
body: Trigger alerts when backups fail, run late, or produce corrupted output. Include log excerpts.

title: Add backup log rotation
body: Ensure backup logs are rotated and archived to prevent excessive disk usage.

title: Add collector service to read panel data
body: Implement the collector that reads power, voltage, and current data from each panel. Ensure reliable polling and error handling.

title: Add data validation for collector
body: Validate incoming panel data for missing fields, out‑of‑range values, and malformed packets. Log and discard invalid entries.

title: Add collector retry and backoff logic
body: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff when panels fail to respond. Avoid overwhelming the system with rapid retries.

title: Add collector logging
body: Add structured logging for collector operations including polling cycles, failures, retries, and data anomalies.

title: Add collector metrics endpoint
body: Expose collector metrics such as poll duration, success rate, and error counts via a backend API endpoint.

title: Add collector configuration support
body: Allow collector behavior (poll interval, timeouts, panel list) to be configured via the central configuration file.

title: Add collector offline detection
body: Detect when a panel stops responding and mark it as offline. Provide timestamps and error codes.

title: Add collector performance optimization
body: Optimize collector loops to reduce CPU usage and improve timing accuracy. Consider async or multiprocessing.

title: Add collector unit tests
body: Write unit tests for collector modules including parsing, validation, retry logic, and error handling.

title: Add collector integration tests
body: Create integration tests that simulate panel responses, timeouts, and malformed data to validate end‑to‑end behavior.

title: Add FastAPI endpoint for current system data
body: Create an endpoint that returns current system metrics including power, energy, panel status, and timestamps. Ensure fast response time.

title: Add FastAPI endpoint for historical data
body: Implement an endpoint to return historical energy and power data with filtering by date range. Optimize for large datasets.

title: Add database models for panel data
body: Create SQLAlchemy models for panel readings, system metrics, and aggregated summaries. Include indexes for performance.

title: Add data ingestion endpoint
body: Add an endpoint for the collector to push panel data. Validate payloads and store records efficiently.

title: Add authentication support
body: Implement optional API authentication using tokens or API keys. Allow enabling/disabling via configuration.

title: Add backend caching layer
body: Add caching for frequently accessed endpoints such as current system status and daily summaries to reduce database load.

title: Add backend health check endpoint
body: Create a lightweight health check endpoint for systemd and monitoring tools to verify backend availability.

title: Add error handling middleware
body: Implement global exception handlers to return structured error responses and log stack traces.

title: Add backend unit tests
body: Write unit tests for API routes, models, and utility functions. Include mocks for database and caching layers.

title: Add backend integration tests
body: Create integration tests that validate end‑to‑end behavior including data ingestion, querying, and error scenarios.
